title: JWTClaims
description: Standard JWT payload claims for any backend authentication system (Skill 10 - jwt-authentication)

sub.description: Subject identifier for the authenticated principal

principalId.description: Optional internal principal identifier used for fast lookups

roles.description: Optional role names used by the authorization layer when the project uses RBAC

tenantId.description: Optional tenant or workspace identifier for multi-tenant systems

jti.description: Optional token identifier for revocation or audit tracking

iat.description: Issued At — Unix timestamp (seconds) when the token was created

exp.description: Expiration — Unix timestamp (seconds) when the token expires
